source.section: 4 - AN/ASQ-228 ATFLIR Targeting Pod > 4.5 - Pointing Methods > 4.5.2 - VVSLV (Velocity Vector Slaved)

steps.action: Select FLIR page and press the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the selected DDI.
The Select Focus Diamond indicates what display is selected.
Select VVSLV by either: Selecting the VVSLV pushbutton on the FLIR page, or; Pressing the Undesignate button twice within one second.
Press OSB next to RTCL (boxed) to display the targeting pod’s reticle
To designate a target, fly the aircraft to set the velocity vector on the target, then use the TDC DEPRESS control (“ENTER”). A diamond will appear over the designated point on the FLIR page.
